Nice 34% return on my TNSR short today 🔥

every 1-2 months TNSR has a 50-90% unexplained pump in price

every pump has retraced almost completely within 24hrs

I wait until the pump starts retracing & then open my short once a top seems to be in

normally I keep the position open for 12-24hrs as the funding rate to short is crazy high

no idea who is pumping it but thx for the free money 🤝

Got my weekly Aura points from Bulktrade ✅

The conservative math looks good

> 30% community allocation (est. 10-15% S1 airdrop)
> exp. $100M FDV
> final Aura supply of 30M

Expecting $0.3 - $0.5 per Aura (S1)

That means in 2 weeks I earned $69 from a $4k deposit (45% APY) 🔥

PSA: Don't bet on Sports if you're not good at it 👍

Lost over $2,000 this month betting on the World Cup

I was basically profitable in every single other Polymarket category

The TLDR is there are better +EV opportunities than Sports

Sports is full of sharps & traditional sportsbooks so it's hard to find an edge

However, Crypto, Mentions, Finance, Tech all offer many  markets which are naturally inefficient

For example, the word "Visa" has been said every single World Cup game but I was able to buy Yes shares at 88c

If that was a sportsbook, it would be trading at 98c+

If you aren't good at trading sports, stay away from it unless it's for fun but being profitable is very hard long-term

Don't go broke trading the World Cup lol

ETH has to hit 3 figures before the bear market is over

Daily up/down markets are Polymarket LP alpha 🔥

> easy to get 35%+ of LP rewards
> markets aren't very volatile if at 98c+ vs markets at 50c
> works with lower liquidity

One of my favourite LP strategies for earning rewards towards the end of the day ✅ https://t.co/bvR8XaUVEd
